subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is no God but Him, and verily I am He, and He is the Glory in this exalted and mighty station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و انا هو و هو البهاء فی هذا الطراز العلی العظیم
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
